title: isodon walkeri
intro: Isodon walkeri, also known as Himalayan isodon or Himalayan golden root, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Isodon walkeri include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and improving respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Isodon walkeri include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
